diagnosis_name: Acid-Base Disorder (Based on Arterial Blood Gas Analysis)

first_line_drugs.notes: Administer to maintain SpO2 >94% in respiratory disorders or hypoxia
For dehydration, shock, or metabolic acidosis due to fluid loss; 10-20 mL/kg bolus as needed
Indicated in severe metabolic acidosis (pH <7.1); dose 1-2 mEq/kg IV slowly after ABG confirmation

second_line_drugs.notes: For respiratory failure or severe acidosis/alkalosis not responding to medical therapy

second_line_drugs.drug: Treat underlying cause (e.g., antibiotics, insulin, bronchodilators)
second_line_drugs.notes: Definitive management depends on primary disorder identified in ABG

investigations.name: Serum Electrolytes (Na, K, Cl, HCO3)
investigations.indication: Anion gap calculation and cause identification

counselling: ABG helps identify the type of acid-base imbalance in the body. — ABG शरीर में एसिड-बेस असंतुलन का प्रकार पहचानने में मदद करता है।
Treatment depends on the underlying cause rather than just correcting numbers. — इलाज सिर्फ नंबर ठीक करने से नहीं, बल्कि मूल कारण ठीक करने पर निर्भर करता है।
Frequent monitoring is required in critically ill patients. — गंभीर रूप से बीमार बच्चों में बार-बार जांच जरूरी है।
Do not delay treatment in severe cases while awaiting reports. — गंभीर मामलों में रिपोर्ट का इंतजार किए बिना इलाज शुरू करें।
Follow-up tests are important to ensure recovery. — ठीक होने की पुष्टि के लिए फॉलो-अप जांच जरूरी है।
referral_criteria: Refer to pediatric intensivist if severe acid-base imbalance, shock, respiratory failure, or mixed disorder suspected
hospitalisation_criteria: Severe metabolic acidosis/alkalosis, respiratory failure, altered sensorium, or need for IV therapy/ventilation
notes: Always follow systematic approach: assess pH → identify primary disorder → calculate compensation → check anion gap → evaluate delta ratio for mixed disorders.
expected_course: Improvement depends on correction of underlying cause; ABG normalizes gradually with treatment
key_clinical_points: Always identify primary disorder before treating
Anion gap helps differentiate metabolic acidosis causes

severity_assessment.mild: Slight pH abnormality with stable vitals
